Scr_BF_1_01

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Morning, everyone.

\c[2]Mr. David:\c[0]
Morning.

\c[4]Julia:\c[0]
It's rare to see you up so early in the morning.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Well, just trying to fix the bad habits.

\c[4]Julia:\c[0]
That's really good to see.

\c[4]Julia:\c[0]
I was so worried about you. We all were.

\c[4]Julia:\c[0]
You were so devastated after losing your job.

\c[4]Julia:\c[0]
It's good to see you are finally getting back on your feet.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Well, I have to. I can't just be a burden to you guys forever.

\c[2]Mr. David:\c[0]
What are you talking about? You were never a burden to us.

\c[4]Julia:\c[0]
Yes, Jane, you may not be my biological daughter, but I never think of you as anything else.

\c[4]Julia:\c[0]
You were my daughter since the day we took you in after your parent's accidents.
Scr_BF_1_02

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I know. For that, I am forever grateful to you all.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
And when I got fired from the job, you were nothing but supportive of me.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I don't know what I would have done without both of you.

\c[4]Julia:\c[0]
Of course, we will always support you.

\c[4]Julia:\c[0]
Not only because we are your family but also because you tried to do the right thing.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Yeah. But maybe I shouldn't have.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Then I still would have the job.

\c[2]Mr. David:\c[0]
Don't think like that.

\c[2]Mr. David:\c[0]
It's better to lose a job than sacrifice your humanity.

\c[2]Mr. David:\c[0]
You made the right choice.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Thanks. But still, I can't just be cooped up inside for the rest of my life.
Scr_BF_1_01

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I have to go out and do something. Although, I probably won't get another job in corporate again.

\c[2]Mr. David:\c[0]
Right now, what you need more than anything is to keep yourself busy.

\c[2]Mr. David:\c[0]
That will help you recover from the depression.

\c[2]Mr. David:\c[0]
So maybe you should start with something small and climb your way up from there.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Yeah, I think the same way.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I will see if any local businesses like cafes or restaurants hiring right now.

\c[4]Julia:\c[0]
That's an excellent idea!

\c[4]Julia:\c[0]
In that case, I may also have something for you.

\c[4]Julia:\c[0]
I met with Rebeca's mother the other day. She said that she is looking to hire someone for housework.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
You mean \c[1]Aunt Clara\c[0]?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I don't know. It feels a bit weird to work for my friend's mom.

\c[4]Julia:\c[0]
Why don't to talk to her first before making any decision?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Sure, I can do that.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I was also thinking about seeing Rebeca. So, I would have gone there anyway.
Scr_BF_1_02

\c[2]Mr. David:\c[0]
And speaking of jobs, I saw a "help wanted" poster outside the grocery shop the other day.

\c[2]Mr. David:\c[0]
You may want to check that out.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Alright, I will keep it in mind.

\c[4]Julia:\c[0]
There you go. You already got two job opportunities.

\c[4]Julia:\c[0]
And you haven't even gone out yet. Isn't that great?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Yeah, I guess.

\c[4]Julia:\c[0]
So, cheer up, will you?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
You are right. No point in thinking about the past.

\c[4]Julia:\c[0]
That's the spirit.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Well then, I guess I will be off to see what kind of jobs are waiting for me.

\c[4]Julia:\c[0]
Wait up a minute.

\c[4]Julia:\c[0]
Since you are going out, can you do me a favor?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Sure, what is it?

\c[4]Julia:\c[0]
A parcel was mistakenly delivered to us that belongs to our neighbors.

\c[4]Julia:\c[0]
Can you take it to them?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Yeah, I can do that.

\c[4]Julia:\c[0]
Then give me a moment...

\c[4]Julia:\c[0]
There you go.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Well then, see you all later.

\c[4]Julia:\c[0]
Bye.

\c[2]Mr. David:\c[0]

BG_Home_Living Room

\c[4]Julia:\c[0]
Hey Jane, someone here to see you.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Who?

\c[4]Julia:\c[0]
He said he is a lawyer.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
A lawyer!

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
What does a lawyer want with me!

\c[4]Julia:\c[0]
I don’t know. He wouldn’t tell me.

\c[4]Julia:\c[0]
He said he only wants to talk to you.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Alright. I’ll go and see what it is all about.
\>Jane saw someone sitting in the living room.
\>She approched him.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Can I help you?

\c[2]Lawyer:\c[0]
You are Jane, I presume?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Yes, I’m. What do you want?

\c[2]Lawyer:\c[0]
I represent your former employers, the GRN Corps.

\c[2]Lawyer:\c[0]
And they decided to sue you.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
What!

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Tell me you are joking!

\c[2]Lawyer:\c[0]
Do I look like a joker to you?

\c[2]Lawyer:\c[0]
No, I’m serious.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
What are they suing me for?

\c[2]Lawyer:\c[0]
For the same reason you got fired.

\c[2]Lawyer:\c[0]
Corporate espionage.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
It’s not true. They framed me!

\c[2]Lawyer:\c[0]
Really? Can you prove it in court?
(\c[23]She said nothing.\c[0])

\c[2]Lawyer:\c[0]
Just as I thought.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Why now?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
They fired me three months ago. Why are they suing me now?

\c[2]Lawyer:\c[0]
Well, there has been a new development.

\c[2]Lawyer:\c[0]
We caught another one of our employees stealing sensitive documents.

\c[2]Lawyer:\c[0]
That’s why we decided to make a statement by suing you.

\c[2]Lawyer:\c[0]
So that no one in the future will ever try to do something like that.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Then why are you coming after me? Sue the new guy who stole your shit.

\c[2]Lawyer:\c[0]
We would love to. But turns out he is a bit smarter than you are.

\c[2]Lawyer:\c[0]
We don’t have enough evidence against him.

\c[2]Lawyer:\c[0]
You, on the other hand, are a different case.

\c[2]Lawyer:\c[0]
We have CC camera footage of you stealing company documents.

\c[2]Lawyer:\c[0]
So, if we take you to court, you will have no chance of winning.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Please, don’t do this!

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
They already fired me, ruined my career. Just leave me alone. I’m begging you!

\c[2]Lawyer:\c[0]
Hey, now. I’m not the one suing you, and I’m just a lawyer.

\c[2]Lawyer:\c[0]
But my clients are very considerate. So they decided to throw you a lifeline.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Really?!

\c[2]Lawyer:\c[0]
Yes. They want a public apology from you and...

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Done. I’ll do it. I’ll say whatever they want me to say.

\c[2]Lawyer:\c[0]
Hold on, I’m not finished.

\c[2]Lawyer:\c[0]
They also want you to pay half-million bucks for all the damage you caused.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
What!

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
How do they expect me to pay half a million?!

\c[2]Lawyer:\c[0]
Actually, they don’t. They know you can’t pay that much money.

\c[2]Lawyer:\c[0]
But it will give them good publicity.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
What are you talking about?

\c[2]Lawyer:\c[0]
Imagine the story...

\c[2]Lawyer:\c[0]
A big company like GRN caught one of their employees stealing from them. But instead of taking her to court, they gave her a chance to redeem herself.

\c[2]Lawyer:\c[0]
All they asked her to do was give back the money she got from selling sensitive information to the rival company.

\c[2]Lawyer:\c[0]
But she refuses to do even that. So GRN Corps has no choice but to take her to court.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
You filthy piece of shit!

\c[2]Lawyer:\c[0]
Badmouthing won’t do you any good.

\c[2]Lawyer:\c[0]
What you can do is somehow manage half a million bucks.

\c[2]Lawyer:\c[0]
Take your time. We are in no hurry.

\c[2]Lawyer:\c[0]
We don’t want anyone to blame us for not giving you enough time.

\c[2]Lawyer:\c[0]
See you... Until next time.

\c[4]Julia:\c[0]
Oh, honey! I heard what that lawyer was talking about.

\c[4]Julia:\c[0]
I’m so sorry!

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Don’t be. It’s not your fault.

\c[4]Julia:\c[0]
Look, we will come up with something.

\c[4]Julia:\c[0]
Maybe David can take out a loan from the bank...

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
No! Absolutely not!

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
It is my mess. I’m the one who should clean it up.

\c[4]Julia:\c[0]
Are you sure? I don’t want to see you go to jail.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I won’t.
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] I hope.\c[0])

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
And don’t tell David about it. I don’t want him to worry too.

\c[4]Julia:\c[0]
Alright, fine. I won’t tell anyone.

\c[4]Julia:\c[0]
But if you think you can’t handle it on your own...

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I’ll come to you.

\c[4]Julia:\c[0]
You better.

\c[4]Julia:\c[0]
Maybe you should talk to your boss. I mean, your former boss.

\c[4]Julia:\c[0]
You did work for them for a while. Maybe he will take pity on you.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I don’t think he will.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
But I will give it a shot.

\c[4]Julia:\c[0]
Don’t lose hope, honey. I’m sure everything will be alright.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I sure hope so.
